## Checklist
- [ ] `ruff check .` is clean
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` is clean
- [ ] `mypy yoink` is clean
- [ ] `pytest` passes (added/updated tests if behaviour changed)
- [ ] `README.md` / `docs/` updated if user-facing
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
